subcodes.first_line: The Book hath been sent down by the All-Merciful unto them that dwell within the realm of possibility, that perchance mankind may cast away what they possess and take hold of that which they are commanded [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله الرحمن لمن فی الامکان لعل الناس یضعن ما عندهم و یاخذن ما امروا به
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience
